items.caption: The image contains a slide with a blue background and white text. The text is a bullet-pointed list discussing the emotional/psychological wounding that may result from a number of physical responses and stressors. It mentions that this can lead to lower production, performance, morale, and development of a negative attitude at work. The slide also mentions that counseling provides the foundation to the employees to process their emotional wounding and psychological disturbances by being helped to cope with the situation or deal with them.
